title: Legacy Better Ping Display
description: A port of the Better Ping Display mod to Legacy Fabric 1.8.9.
body:
# Legacy Better Ping Display

This is a port of [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric) to Legacy Fabric.

Displays each player's ping in the player list as a number, allowing to easily monitor the connection quality in real-time. With options for customization, users can adjust the color and style of the ping display to suit their preferences, ensuring that they stay informed about their network performance while enjoying the game.
